items.title: Mobileye’s US robotaxi launch will put it on both sides of the AV business
items.summary: The Israeli tech company and Intel subsidiary said it will launch its own robotaxi service in a U.S. city in 2027.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Nimble’s New Modular Power Bank Can Be Shared With a Friend
items.summary: Nimble’s thoughtfully designed SharePower is a modular power bank you can share with a friend.
